title: Packaged documents
description: Packaged markdown reference topics printed from the installed you-agent-factory CLI via you docs.
openingSummary: Packaged documents are markdown reference topics embedded in the installed you binary and printed with you docs.

whatItCovers.title: What It Covers
whatItCovers.body: Packaged documents are packaged markdown reference topics printed from the installed you binary via you docs or you docs <topic>. Use this surface when you need the shipped CLI terminology for discovery, topic reference, and freshness—without treating the web page as a live sync of that packaged markdown.

keyConcepts.title: Key Concepts
keyConcepts.body: A packaged document is a markdown reference topic shipped inside the installed you binary. Topics are referenced by topic id, such as agents, config, or packaged-goal. Factory-local docs under a factory root are separate from these binary-embedded topics.

howToUse.title: How To Use
howToUse.body: Print the packaged topic index first, then pass a supported topic id to print that topic’s authored markdown. No live factory is required. Open the CLI documentation page when you need the broader command matrix beyond packaged topic lookup.

limitsAndAssumptions.title: Limits And Assumptions
limitsAndAssumptions.body: This page is the web reference for packaged you docs topics. It is not a full topic dump, not a sync of packaged markdown into the site, not factory-local factory/docs authorship, and not the CLI install or command-matrix deep page. Sibling documentation links aid discovery only.

links.indexCommandLabel: Print the quick-start blurb and packaged topic index:
links.topicCommandLabel: Print one authored topic (agents is the orientation topic):

discovery.body: Discovery starts from you docs with no topic: that command prints the quick-start blurb and the packaged topic index. A supported topic argument prints that topic’s authored markdown with no wrapper formatting.

referenceAndFreshness.body: Reference topics by topic id from the packaged index. Content freshness tracks the installed CLI binary—upgrade the CLI to receive updated packaged topics. This Program documentation page is not a live sync of packaged markdown.

exampleNotes.body: Replace agents with any other supported topic id from the index, such as config or packaged-goal, when you need that topic’s authored markdown.
